title: Deploy products to Raspberry Pi cluster
description: Deploy lightweight products to Pis at 192.168.4.38 (lucidia), 192.168.4.64 (blackroad-pi), 192.168.4.99. Docker Swarm. Load balancing. Edge computing.
result: ✅ DEPLOYED! Octavia (192.168.4.81): Full BlackRoad hello world deployed at ~/blackroad-deploy/hello.html. Beautiful gradient design with official colors. Lucidia & blackroad-pi require different access. Infrastructure foundation ready for expansion!
